rationale: The query's core method is a dynamical model of spreading on scale-free networks using mean-field balance equations to analyze epidemic thresholds and critical behavior. The candidate studies cascading failures in interdependent networks using percolation theory and critical average degree thresholds, not the same dynamical spreading machinery. The candidate's object (interdependent networks in engineering/societal systems) is genuinely different from the query's (computer virus infections on the Internet).
